findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: lion_verified_company_file, lion_compliance_bundle, lion_web_search, lion_deep_research, lion_x402_intel, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_scrape, lion_social_signal_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, ultraFastSmartMoneyFlag, lionSafetyDailyPass · Private data: lion_declare_need, lion_quick_intel, lion_verified_company_file, lion_composite_bundle, lion_enrich_v1, lion_enrichment_tx_bundle, lion_web_enrichment_bundle, lion_domain_intel, lion_sec_financials, lion_compliance_bundle, lion_compliance_audit_receipt, lion_deep_research, lion_x402_intel, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_ofac_sanctions_screen, lion_vat_validation, lion_wikidata_firmographics, lion_credits_purchase, lion_adaptive_query, lion_keyless_base_rpc, lion_token_risk_indicators, ultraFastBatchRisk, ultraFastIsHoneypot, ultraFastLiquidityCheck, ultraFastSafetyStack, ultraFastRugVector, ultraFastSmartMoneyFlag, ultraFastPreSpendGate, ultraFastFullStackBundle, lionSafetyDailyPass · Public sink: lion_deep_research, lion_social_signal_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, lionSafetyDailyPass · Destructive: lion_verified_company_file, lion_composite_bundle, lion_enrich_v1, lion_compliance_bundle, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, ultraFastFullStackBundle, lionSafetyDailyPass.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: lion_verified_company_file, lion_compliance_bundle, lion_web_search, lion_deep_research, lion_x402_intel, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_scrape, lion_social_signal_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, ultraFastSmartMoneyFlag, lionSafetyDailyPass · Private data: lion_declare_need, lion_quick_intel, lion_verified_company_file, lion_composite_bundle, lion_enrich_v1, lion_enrichment_tx_bundle, lion_web_enrichment_bundle, lion_domain_intel, lion_sec_financials, lion_compliance_bundle, lion_compliance_audit_receipt, lion_deep_research, lion_x402_intel, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_ofac_sanctions_screen, lion_vat_validation, lion_wikidata_firmographics, lion_credits_purchase, lion_adaptive_query, lion_keyless_base_rpc, lion_token_risk_indicators, ultraFastBatchRisk, ultraFastIsHoneypot, ultraFastLiquidityCheck, ultraFastSafetyStack, ultraFastRugVector, ultraFastSmartMoneyFlag, ultraFastPreSpendGate, ultraFastFullStackBundle, lionSafetyDailyPass · Public sink: lion_deep_research, lion_social_signal_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, lionSafetyDailyPass · Destructive: lion_verified_company_file, lion_composite_bundle, lion_enrich_v1, lion_compliance_bundle, query_x402_economy_intel, lion_keyless_base_rpc, ultraFastFullStackBundle, lionSafetyDailyPass

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
